ModMetaData.name: FIP - Hubris
ModMetaData.author: BavarianBarbarian21
ModMetaData.description: Hubris reimagines Royalty's anima and psycast systems as cryptid occultism for a Fallout playthrough. It renames psylinks into cryptid insight, recasts meditation and linking text into occult study, and replaces anima tree visuals with Mothman-themed shrine content.
